configured_actions.description: List of configured_actions. Each entry encodes one configured_action as filter_name:action:diagnostic_name, where filter_name is the filter short name returned by plugin->get_name(), action is one of none/comfortable/moderate/emergency, and diagnostic_name is the DiagnosticStatus name to publish when that action fires on the best candidate trajectory.

no_candidates_diag_status_name.description: Diagnostic status name published at ERROR when no candidate trajectory is available. Set to an empty string to disable this status.
